message:
feat(db): add MVCC concurrent write infrastructure (br-25kea)

Build complete MVCC write-conflict retry infrastructure for BEGIN CONCURRENT
support when DbConn switches to FrankenConnection:

- CONCURRENT_MODE_ENABLED: env-configurable gate (FSQLITE_CONCURRENT_MODE)
- begin_concurrent_tx: falls back to BEGIN IMMEDIATE when disabled or
  unsupported by the backend
- MVCC retry loop in create_message_with_recipients: exponential backoff
  on WriteConflict/SerializationFailure/SnapshotTooOld
- MvccRetryMetrics: atomic counters (retries_total, exhausted_total)
- integrity.rs/pool.rs: explicit SqliteConnection for PRAGMA integrity_check
  (FrankenConnection doesn't implement these PRAGMAs)

DbConn remains SqliteConnection because frankensqlite's INSERT codegen
returns "not implemented: INSERT ... SELECT with VALUES body" for
INSERT INTO t (cols) VALUES (...). All MVCC infrastructure is wired and
ready for a one-line switch when that's fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
